acceptance.criterion: `python3 -m unittest tests.test_cobbler_agents_implement` passes with `CLAUDE_CODE_SDK_HAS_OAUTH_REFRESH=1 CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION=1` exported
acceptance.evidence: At commit 5729f97 with both flags exported: Ran 67 tests ... OK (skipped=3). Pre-fix baseline at 2d0516d: FAILED (failures=1) test_cli_gate_failure_exit_code. Full suite with flags exported: Ran 1034 tests ... OK (skipped=12); identical with the Claude Code vars unset (CI-like).

acceptance.criterion: New regression test proves exact-value redaction still fires for a secret-named env var with a >=8-char value (old behavior preserved)
acceptance.evidence: RunGateTests.test_gate_still_redacts_minimum_length_secret_named_env_values (tests/test_cobbler_agents_implement.py): an exactly-8-char CUSTOM_GATE_TOKEN value printed by the gate child appears as [REDACTED:exact_grant] in the returned record and in persisted gates/batch-13.json. Collector unit tests in tests/test_cobbler_agents_dispatch.py (ContextRedactionTests.test_collect_secret_env_values_*) pin the 8-char boundary both ways. Commit 5729f97; revert-check confirmed the corruption-direction tests fail on pre-fix source while this one passes.

acceptance.criterion: Exactly one env-derived exact-secret collector remains; both call sites import it
acceptance.evidence: grep: def collect_secret_env_values exists only at scripts/cobbler_runtime/context.py:238 (MIN_EXACT_SECRET_VALUE_LENGTH=8); implement.py _inherited_secret_values and cobbler_agents.py _secret_env_values are deleted; both modules import the collector (implement.py:30, cobbler_agents.py:76) and every env-derived exact_values feed calls it (implement.py:2278; cobbler_agents.py:157,240,251,264,1219,1489). Grant-derived exact values (implement.py exact_grants, worker verified_grant_values) remain separate by design. Commit 5729f97.

acceptance.criterion: Fixture tests prove gc refuses: dirty worktree, unmerged branch, unpushed commits, current directory, main worktree, unregistered sibling directory

Report mode performs zero mutations (asserted on fixture repo state)
Dogfood evidence: the five merged elves worktrees removed; the five unmerged benchmark worktrees and all unregistered siblings untouched and listed in the report
Repo-consistency CI stays green (pinned worktree phrases unchanged or pins updated together with the prose)
Validator test: staged session with `work_driver: grok-build` and no `worker_packet_path` produces the warning; with the path recorded, no warning; host-native produces no warning
All six documentation surfaces carry the packet-at-staging rule and cross-link rather than restate it
Repo-consistency CI green; any newly pinned phrases added deliberately and minimally
Work-driver spellings normalize identically in validator and docs (devin covered)
Exactly one `run_git` definition body remains (delegators allowed); zero raw `subprocess.run(["git"` call sites left in `full_run.py`
`context.ensure_private_dir` gone; `api-break-approvals.json` entry passes strict `verify_repo.py --ci` validation
Full suite green; `test_storage_isolation_git.py`, `test_dispatch_isolation.py`, `test_full_run_supervisor.py` specifically green (regression preservation)
Session filename literal appears exactly once in `cobbler_runtime/`
`wc -l README.md` ≤ 450; no `v2.x adds`-style narration outside CHANGELOG.md
`references/glossary.md` exists and covers every term it promises; no dead links
Repo-consistency CI green with pins updated alongside prose in the same commits
Install + first-run path still complete: following README alone reaches a working `install_doctor.py --startup` pass (regression preservation for onboarding)
`consistency_policy.py` line count reduced by ≥ 50% with CI still green
A deliberate drift injected in a test fixture is still caught for the retained safety-kernel pins (regression preservation for the checker itself)
`full_run.py` ≤ 7,500 lines (measurable god-file bar, not a structure lock alone)
Supervisor script passes lint as a real file; at least one direct unit test exercises its argument/protocol surface
`tests/test_full_run_supervisor.py` and the full suite green (regression preservation)

continuation_guard.reason: finite run in progress; stop at completion, hard blocker, or user stop

master_acceptance.criterion: Full suite green in an environment that includes short-valued secret-named env vars (Claude Code session): `CLAUDE_CODE_SDK_HAS_OAUTH_REFRESH=1 python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
Dogfooded gc: five merged elves worktrees removed, unmerged benchmarks and unregistered siblings reported untouched; `git worktree list` reflects it
A staged delegable run records `worker_packet_path`; the validator warns when it is missing for non-host-native drivers; both schemas and both staging templates carry the field
README ≤ 450 lines, glossary exists, version narration lives only in CHANGELOG, repo-consistency CI green, `verify_repo.py --ci` green at the release version
No unapproved public API breaks: `api-break-approvals.json` entries exist for every intentional removal and strict verification accepts them
